title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. mutinense
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. mutinense, also known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Italy. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. mutinense include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
